statement: No AUSTRALIAN-government (ACSC/DTA) reusable AI-coding-agent build template or 'AGENTS.md for government' standard exists; AU gov publishes policy (DTA AI Policy v2.0) and risk guidance, not a deployable coding-agent governance baseline — leaving a genuine gap agent-enterprise fills, though it overlaps materially with the UK GDS guidance.

evidence.quote: AGENTS.md is a simple, open format for guiding coding agents ... stewarded by the Agentic AI Foundation under the Linux Foundation
ten specific principles tailored to AI coding assistants

falsifier: Discovery of an ACSC/DTA-published, deployable AI-coding-agent template or a 'gov AGENTS.md' baseline repo would falsify the 'no AU gov template' claim outright.
